Returns a SANITIZED config safe\n        to send to the browser — only the ephemeral value and model are included;\n        the real API key is never forwarded.\n        \"\"\"\n        async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=30.0) as client:\n            resp = await client.post(\n                \"https://api.openai.com/v1/realtime/client_secrets\",\n                headers={\n                    \"Authorization\": f\"Bearer {self.api_key}\",\n                    \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\",\n                },\n                json={\n                    \"session\": {\n                        \"type\": \"realtime\",\n                        \"model\": self.model,\n                        \"audio\": {\n                            \"output\": {\"voice\": voice or self.voice},\n                            \"input\": {\n                                \"transcription\": {\"model\": \"whisper-1\"},\n                            },\n                        },\n                        \"instructions\": self.system_message,\n                        \"tools\": self.tools,\n                    }\n                },\n            )\n            if not resp.is_success:\n                self.logger.error(\n                    f\"OpenAI client_secrets failed: {resp.status_code} — {resp.text}\"\n                )\n            resp.raise_for_status()\n            data = resp.json()\n\n        # SECURITY: Only return fields the client needs.\n        # Never forward the raw response — it may contain server-side secrets.\n        return {\n            \"client_secret\": {\"value\": data[\"value\"]},\n            \"model\": self.model,\n        }\n\n    async def change_voice(self, voice: str) -> str:\n        \"\"\"\n        Change the assistant's voice by sending a session.update event.\n\n        Uses the OpenAI Realtime API's session.update event to change the voice\n        without needing to regenerate ephemeral keys or tear down the WebRTC\n        connection. This is faster and more reliable than the old reinit approach.\n\n        The function_call_output reply (sent by _handle_tool_call after this\n        returns) will be spoken by DUCK-E in the new voice.\n        \"\"\"\n        if voice not in AVAILABLE_VOICES:\n            return (\n                f\"Invalid voice '{voice}'. \"\n                f\"Available voices: {', will send response.create to trigger continuation.\n            await self.websocket.send_json({\n                \"type\": \"ducke.session_update\",\n                \"update\": {\n },\n            })\n            return f\"Voice changed to {voice}.\"\n        except Exception as e:\n            self.logger.error(f\"Failed to change voice: {e}\", exc_info=True)\n            return f\"Failed to change voice: {str(e)}\"\n\n    async def run(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"\n        Main session loop.\n\n        The WebSocket has already been accepted by the security middleware\n        before this is called, so we do NOT call websocket.accept() here.\n        \"\"\"\n        try:\n            session_data = await self._get_ephemeral_key()\n        except \"type\": \"ducke.backend_cost\",\n                \"model\": model,\n                \"input_tokens\": input_tokens,\n                \"output_tokens\": output_tokens,\n            })\n        except Exception:\n            pass  # Never crash the session over cost relay\n\n    async def _handle_tool_call(self, data: dict[str, Any]) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Execute a registered tool and send the result back to the client.\"\"\"\n        name = data.get(\"name\")\n        call_id = data.get(\"call_id\")\n        t_received = time.monotonic()\n\n        self.logger.info(json.dumps({\n            \"event\": \"tool_call.received\",\n            \"tool\": name,\n            \"call_id\": call_id,\n            \"ts\": time.time(),\n        }))\n\n        try:\n            args = json.loads(data.get(\"arguments\", \"{}\"))\n        except json.JSONDecodeError:\n            args = {}\n\n        handler = self.tool_handlers.get(name)\n        if not handler:\n            self.logger.warning(f\"No handler registered for tool: {name}\")\n            return\n\n        self.logger.info(json.dumps({\n            \"event\": \"tool_call.handler_start\",\n            \"tool\": name,\n            \"call_id\": call_id,\n            \"args\": args,\n            \"ts\": time.time(),\n        }))\n        t_handler_start = time.monotonic()\n\n        try:\n            if asyncio.iscoroutinefunction(handler):\n                result = await handler(**args)\n            else:\n                result = handler(**args)\n        except Exception as e:\n str(result)\n        self.logger.info(json.dumps({\n            \"event\": \"tool_call.handler_done\",\n            \"tool\": name,\n            \"call_id\": call_id,\n            \"result_size\": result_str,\n            },\n        })\n        # NOTE: response.create is sent by the browser client (ag2client.js)\n        # immediately after it forwards the function_call_output to the\n        # OpenAI data channel.  Sending it from the backend was unreliable\n        # because the relay adds latency and the message could be dropped.\n\n        t_sent = time.monotonic()\n        self.logger.info(json.dumps({\n            \"event\": \"tool_call.result_sent\",\n            \"tool\": name,\n            \"call_id\": call_id,\n            \"result_size\": len(result_str),\n            \"total_duration_ms\": round((t_sent - t_received) * 1000, 1),\n            \"ts\": time.time(),\n        }))\n","numLines":287,"startLine":1,"totalLines":287}}}

...toolSummaries,\n201\t    `response: ${fmt(responseDur)}`,\n202\t    `total: ${fmt(total)}`,\n203\t  ];\n204\t  console.log(`[DUCK-E Perf] ${parts.join(', ')}`);\n205\t};\n206\t\n207\t// Configure userAvatar.textContent = firstLetter;\n293\t    }\n294\t  } else {\n295\t    // User is not logged in\n296\t    if (loginBtn && typeof OAUTH_CONFIGURED !== 'undefined' && OAUTH_CONFIGURED) {\n297\t      loginBtn.style.display = 'inline-flex';\n298\t    }\n299\t    if (userInfoDiv) userInfoDiv.style.display = 'none';\n300\t  }\n301\t};\n302\t\n303\t// Handle OAuth login\n304\tconst handleLogin = () => {\n305\t  // Redirect to Google OAuth\n306\t  const redirectUri = `${window.location.protocol}//${window.location.host}/auth/callback`;\n307\t  window.location.href = `/auth/login?redirect_uri=${encodeURIComponent(redirectUri)}`;\n308\t};\n309\t\n310\t// Handle OAuth logout\n311\tconst handleLogout = () => {\n312\t  clearOAuthState();\n313\t  updateLoginUI();\n314\t\n315\t  // Disconnect if connected\n316\t  if (connectionStatus && webRTC) {\n317\t    webRTC.close();\n318\t    updateUI(\"disconnected\");\n319\t    connectionStatus = false;\n320\t    resetCostState();\n321\t  }\n322\t};\n323\t\n324\t// Get WebSocket URL with auth headers\n325\tconst getWebSocketUrl = () => {\n326\t  const url = new URL(socketUrl);\n327\t\n328\t  // Add OAuth token if available\n329\t  if (oauthToken) {\n330\t    // We'll pass the token via WebSocket subprotocol or query param\n331\t    // For now, we'll pass it as a query parameter (less secure but functional)\n332\t    // In production, you'd want to pass it via WebSocket subprotocols\n333\t    url.searchParams.set('token', oauthToken);\n334\t  }\n335\t\n336\t  return url.toString();\n337\t};\n338\t\n339\t// Update mute button UI (both main and inline)\n340\tconst updateMuteUI = (muted) => {\n341\t  // Main controls\n342\t  const muteBtn = const muteBtnInline = document.getElementById('mute-btn-inline');\n347\t  const muteIconInline = document.getElementById('mute-icon-inline');\n348\t  const muteTextInline = document.getElementById('mute-text-inline');\n349\t\n350\t  const icon = muted ? '🔇' : '🔊';\n351\t  const text = muted ? 'Unmute' : 'Mute';\n352\t\n353\t  if (muteBtn) {\n354\t    if (muted) {\n355\t      muteBtn.classList.add('muted');\n356\t    } else {\n357\t      muteBtn.classList.remove('muted');\n358\t    }\n359\t  }\n360\t  if (muteIcon) muteIcon.textContent = icon;\n361\t  if (muteText) muteText.textContent = text;\n362\t\n363\t  // Update inline controls\n364\t  if (muteBtnInline) {\n365\t    if (muted) {\n366\t      muteBtnInline.classList.add('muted');\n367\t    } else {\n368\t      muteBtnInline.classList.remove('muted');\n369\t    }\n370\t  }\n371\t  if (muteIconInline) muteIconInline.textContent = icon;\n372\t  if (muteTextInline) muteTextInline.textContent = text;\n373\t};\n374\t\n375\t// Update push-to-talk button UI (both main and inline)\n376\tconst updatePTTUI = (enabled) => {\n377\t  console.log('updatePTTUI called with enabled:', enabled);\n378\t  // Main controls\n379\t  const pttToggle = document.getElementById('ptt-toggle');\n380\t  const pttBtn = document.getElementById('ptt-btn');\n381\t  const pttHint = document.querySelector('.ptt-hint');\n382\t  // Inline controls\n383\t  const pttToggleInline = document.getElementById('ptt-toggle-inline');\n384\t  const pttBtnInline = document.getElementById('ptt-btn-inline');\n385\t\n386\t  if (pttToggle) pttToggle.checked = enabled;\n387\t  if (pttToggleInline) pttToggleInline.checked = enabled;\n388\t\n389\t  // Main PTT button\n390\t  if (pttBtn) {\n391\t    if (enabled) {\n392\t      pttBtn.classList.remove('hidden');\n393\t      pttBtn.style.display = 'flex';\n394\t    } else {\n395\t      pttBtn.classList.add('hidden');\n396\t      pttBtn.style.display = 'none';\n397\t    }\n398\t  }\n399\t\n400\t  // Inline PTT button\n401\t  if (pttBtnInline) {\n402\t    if (enabled) {\n403\t      pttBtnInline.classList.remove('hidden');\n404\t      pttBtnInline.style.display = 'flex';\n405\t    } else {\n406\t      pttBtnInline.classList.add('hidden');\n407\t      pttBtnInline.style.display = 'none';\n408\t    }\n409\t  }\n410\t\n411\t  // Show/hide the hint\n412\t  if (pttHint) {\n413\t    pttHint.style.display = enabled ? 'block' : 'none';\n414\t  }\n415\t};\n416\t\n417\t// Set microphone enabled state\n418\tconst setMicrophoneEnabled = (enabled) => {\n419\t  console.log('setMicrophoneEnabled called:', enabled, 'webRTC:', !!webRTC);\n420\t  if (webRTC) {\n421\t    console.log('webRTC.microphone:', webRTC.microphone);\n422\t    if (webRTC.microphone) {\n423\t      webRTC.microphone.enabled = enabled;\n424\t      console.log(`Microphone ${enabled ? => {\n433\t  console.log('toggleMute clicked, webRTC:', !!webRTC, 'connectionStatus:', connectionStatus);\n434\t\n435\t  // Allow toggling state even without connection (will apply on connect)\n436\t  isMuted = !isMuted;\n437\t  updateMuteUI(isMuted);\n438\t  saveMuteState(isMuted);\n439\t  console.log(`Mute state toggled to: ${isMuted}`);\n440\t\n441\t  // Apply immediately if connected\n442\t  if console.log('togglePushToTalk clicked, current state:', isPushToTalk);\n450\t\n451\t  isPushToTalk = !isPushToTalk;\n452\t  updatePTTUI(isPushToTalk);\n453\t  savePushToTalkState(isPushToTalk);\n454\t  console.log(`Push-to-talk mode toggled to: ${isPushToTalk}`);\n455\t\n456\t  // Apply immediately if connected\n457\t  if (webRTC && webRTC.microphone) {\n458\t    if (isPushToTalk) {\n459\t      // setMicrophoneEnabled(!isMuted);\n464\t    }\n465\t  }\n466\t};\n467\t\n468\t// Push-to-talk button handlers\n469\tconst startTalking = () => {\n470\t  if (!isPushToTalk || !webRTC || !webRTC.microphone) return;\n471\t\n472\t  const pttBtn = document.getElementById('ptt-btn');\n473\t  const pttBtnInline = document.getElementById('ptt-btn-inline');\n474\t  if (pttBtn) talking');\n478\t};\n479\t\n480\tconst stopTalking = () => {\n481\t  if (!isPushToTalk || !webRTC || !webRTC.microphone) return;\n482\t\n483\t  const pttBtn = document.getElementById('ptt-btn');\n484\t  const pttBtnInline = document.getElementById('ptt-btn-inline');\n485\t  if (pttBtn) pttBtn.classList.remove('active');\n486\t  if (pttBtnInline) pttBtnInline.classList.remove('active');\n487\t  setMicrophoneEnabled(false);\n488\t  console.log('PTT: Stopped talking');\n489\t};\n490\t\n491\t// Update layout based on chat history (desktop: show inline controls when has content)\n492\tconst updateLayoutMode = (hasHistory) => {\n493\t  const mainContent = document.querySelector('.main-content');\n494\t  if (mainContent) {\n495\t    if (hasHistory) {\n496\t      mainContent.classList.add('has-history');\n497\t    } else {\n498\t      mainContent.classList.remove('has-history');\n499\t    }\n500\t  }\n501\t};\n502\t\n503\t// Transcript display functions\n504\tconst showTranscript = () => {\n505\t  const card = document.getElementById('transcript-card');\n506\t  // Only show and switch layout when there's actual content (not empty placeholders)\n507\t  const hasVisibleContent = transcriptMessages.some(msg => msg.content || msg.streaming);\n508\t  if (card && hasVisibleContent) card.classList.add('visible');\n509\t  updateLayoutMode(hasVisibleContent);\n510\t};\n511\t\n512\tconst hideTranscript = () => {\n513\t  const card = document.getElementById('transcript-card');\n514\t  if (card) card.classList.remove('visible');\n515\t  updateLayoutMode(false);\n516\t};\n517\t\n518\tconst clearTranscript = () => {\n519\t  transcriptMessages = [];\n520\t  renderTranscript();\n521\t  updateLayoutMode(false);\n522\t};\n523\t\n524\t// Find message by itemId\n525\tconst findMessageByItemId = (itemId) => {\n526\t  return transcriptMessages.findIndex(msg => msg.itemId === itemId);\n527\t};\n528\t\n529\t// Create placeholder for conversation item (called when item is created - correct order)\n530\tconst createMessagePlaceholder = (itemId, role) => {\n531\t  // Check if already exists\n532\t  if (findMessageByItemId(itemId) !== -1) return;\n533\t  transcriptMessages.push({\n534\t    itemId,\n535\t    role,\n536\t    content: '',\n537\t    timestamp: Date.now(),\n538\t    pending: true  // Mark as waiting for transcription\n539\t  });\n540\t  renderTranscript();\n541\t  showTranscript();\n542\t};\n543\t\n544\t// Update message content by itemId\n545\tconst updateMessageByItemId = (itemId, content, options = {}) => {\n546\t  const index = findMessageByItemId(itemId);\n547\t  if (index !== -1) {\n548\t    transcriptMessages[index].content = content;\n549\t    transcriptMessages[index].pending = false;\n550\t    if (options.streaming !== undefined) {\n551\t      transcriptMessages[index].streaming = options.streaming;\n552\t    }\n553\t    renderTranscript();\n554\t    showTranscript();\n555\t    return index;\n556\t  }\n557\t  return -1;\n558\t};\n559\t\n560\t// Format tool name for display\n561\tconst formatToolName = (name) => {\n562\t  const displayNames = {\n563\t    get_current_weather: 'Weather',\n564\t    web_search: 'Web Search',\n565\t    web_fetch: 'Fetch URL',\n566\t    voice_change: 'Voice Change',\n567\t    save_memory: 'Save Memory',\n568\t    recall_memories: 'Recall Memories'\n569\t  };\n570\t  return displayNames[name] || name.replace(/_/g, ' ').replace(/\\b\\w/g, l => l.toUpperCase());\n571\t};\n572\t\n573\t// Add a tool call message to the transcript\n574\tconst addToolCallMessage = (name, args, callId) => {\n575\t  transcriptMessages.push({\n576\t    role: 'tool',\n577\t    type: 'tool_call',\n578\t    toolName: name,\n579\t    toolArgs: args,\n580\t    callId: callId,\n581\t    status: 'pending',\n582\t    result: null,\n583\t    timestamp: Date.now(),\n584\t    justAdded: true // Flag for initial animation\n585\t  });\n586\t  renderTranscript();\n587\t  showTranscript();\n588\t};\n589\t\n590\t// Legacy function for messages without itemId\n591\tconst addTranscriptMessage = (role, content, itemId = null) => {\n592\t  if (itemId) {\n593\t    const index = findMessageByItemId(itemId);\n594\t    if (index !== -1) {\n595\t      // Update existing placeholder\n596\t      transcriptMessages[index].content = content;\n597\t      transcriptMessages[index].pending = false;\n598\t      renderTranscript();\n599\t      showTranscript();\n600\t      return;\n601\t    }\n602\t  }\n603\t  // Fallback: add new message\n604\t  transcriptMessages.push({ role, content, timestamp: Date.now(), itemId });\n605\t  renderTranscript();\n606\t  showTranscript();\n607\t};\n608\t\n609\t// Start a new streaming response (returns index)\n610\tconst startStreamingResponse = (role, itemId = null) => {\n611\t  let index;\n612\t  if (itemId) {\n613\t    index = findMessageByItemId(itemId);\n614\t    if (index !== -1) {\n615\t      // Use existing placeholder\n616\t      transcriptMessages[index].streaming = true;\n617\t      transcriptMessages[index].pending = false;\n618\t    } else {\n619\t      // Create new with itemId\n620\t      index = transcriptMessages.length;\n621\t      transcriptMessages.push({ role, content: '', timestamp: Date.now(), streaming: true, itemId });\n622\t    }\n623\t  } else {\n624\t    index = transcriptMessages.length;\n625\t    transcriptMessages.push({ role, content: '', timestamp: Date.now(), streaming: true });\n626\t  }\n627\t  streamingResponse = { index, content: '', role, itemId };\n628\t  renderTranscript();\n629\t  showTranscript();\n630\t  return index;\n631\t};\n632\t\n633\t// Append to streaming response\n634\tconst appendToStreamingResponse = (delta) => {\n635\t  if (!streamingResponse) return;\n636\t  streamingResponse.content += delta;\n637\t  transcriptMessages[streamingResponse.index].content = streamingResponse.content;\n638\t  renderTranscript(true); // Pass true to indicate streaming update\n639\t};\n640\t\n641\t// Finalize streaming response\n642\tconst finalizeStreamingResponse = (finalContent) => {\n643\t  if (!streamingResponse) return;\n644\t  // Use final content if provided, otherwise keep accumulated content\n645\t  if (finalContent) {\n646\t    transcriptMessages[streamingResponse.index].content = finalContent;\n647\t  }\n648\t  transcriptMessages[streamingResponse.index].streaming = false;\n649\t  streamingResponse = null;\n650\t  renderTranscript();\n651\t};\n652\t\n653\tconst renderTranscript = (isStreamingUpdate = false) => {\n654\t  const container = document.getElementById('transcript-content');\n655\t  if (!container) return;\n656\t\n657\t  if (transcriptMessages.length === 0) {\n658\t    container.innerHTML = '<div class=\"transcript-empty\">Conversation transcript will appear here...</div>';\n659\t    return;\n660\t  }\n661\t\n662\t  // For streaming updates, only update the streaming message's text (much faster)\n663\t  if (isStreamingUpdate && streamingResponse) {\n664\t    const streamingEl = container.querySelector(`[data-idx=\"${streamingResponse.index}\"] .transcript-text`);\n665\t    if (streamingEl) {\n666\t      const msg = transcriptMessages[streamingResponse.index];\n667\t      let contentHtml = msg.content || '';\n668\t      // Simple text for streaming - skip markdown parsing for performance\n669\t      contentHtml = contentHtml.replace(/\\n/g, '<br>');\n670\t      contentHtml += '<span class=\"streaming-cursor\">▋</span>';\n671\t      streamingEl.innerHTML = contentHtml;\n672\t      container.scrollTop = container.scrollHeight;\n673\t      return;\n674\t    }\n675\t  }\n676\t\n677\t  // Full render for new messages or finalization\n678\t  // Filter out pending placeholders with no content (always include tool_call messages)\n679\t  const visibleMessages = transcriptMessages.filter(msg => msg.content || msg.streaming || msg.type === 'tool_call');\n680\t\n681\t  if (visibleMessages.length === 0) {\n682\t    container.innerHTML = '<div class=\"transcript-empty\">Conversation transcript will appear here...</div>';\n683\t    return;\n684\t  }\n685\t\n686\t  const html = visibleMessages.map((msg, idx) => {\n687\t    // Tool call messages — collapsed by default, expand to see request + response\n688\t    if (msg.type === 'tool_call') {\n689\t      let argsFormatted = msg.toolArgs || '';\n690\t      try {\n691\t        argsFormatted = JSON.stringify(JSON.parse(msg.toolArgs), null, 2);\n692\t      } catch (e) { /* keep raw */ }\n693\t\n694\t      const statusClass = msg.status === 'completed' ? 'completed' : 'pending';\n695\t\n696\t      // Tool-specific icons\n697\t      const toolIcons = {\n698\t        get_current_weather: '🌤️',\n699\t        web_search: '🔍',\n700\t        web_fetch: '📄',\n701\t        voice_change: '🎙️',\n702\t        save_memory: '💾',\n703\t        recall_memories: '🧠'\n704\t      };\n705\t      const toolIcon = toolIcons[msg.toolName] || '🔧';\n706\t\n707\t      // Format timestamp\n708\t      const time = new Date(msg.timestamp).toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' });\n709\t\n710\t      // Response section inside the expandable body\n711\t      let resultHtml = '';\n712\t      if (msg.result) {\n713\t        resultHtml = `\n714\t          <div class=\"tool-call-section\">\n715\t            <div class=\"tool-call-section-label\">Response</div>\n716\t            <pre class=\"tool-call-section-text\">${msg.result}</pre>\n717\t          </div>`;\n718\t      } else if (msg.status === 'pending') {\n719\t        resultHtml = `\n720\t          <div class=\"tool-call-section\">\n721\t            <span class=\"tool-call-loading\">Waiting for result...</span>\n722\t          </div>`;\n723\t      }\n724\t\n725\t      const justAdded = msg.justAdded ? 'data-just-added=\"true\"' : '';\n726\t      const justCompleted = msg.justCompleted ? 'data-just-completed=\"true\"' : '';\n727\t\n728\t      return `\n729\t        <div class=\"transcript-message tool-call\" data-idx=\"${idx}\" ${justAdded} ${justCompleted}>\n730\t          <details class=\"tool-call-details\" ${msg.justAdded ? 'open' : ''}>\n731\t            <summary class=\"tool-call-summary\">\n732\t              <span class=\"tool-call-icon ${msg.toolName}\">${toolIcon}</span>\n733\t              <span class=\"tool-call-name\">${formatToolName(msg.toolName)}</span>\n734\t              <span class=\"tool-call-timestamp\">${time}</span>\n735\t              <span class=\"tool-call-status ${statusClass}\">${msg.status}</span>\n736\t            </summary>\n737\t            <div class=\"tool-call-body\">\n738\t              <div class=\"tool-call-section\">\n739\t                <div class=\"tool-call-section-label\">Request</div>\n740\t                <pre class=\"tool-call-section-text\">${argsFormatted}</pre>\n741\t              </div>\n742\t              ${resultHtml}\n743\t            </div>\n744\t          </details>\n745\t        </div>\n746\t      `;\n747\t    }\n748\t\n749\t    const roleClass = msg.role === 'user' ? 'user' : msg.role === 'system' ? 'system' : 'assistant';\n750\t    const roleLabel = msg.role === 'user' ? 'You' : msg.role === 'system' ? 'System' : 'DUCK-E';\n751\t    const streamingClass = msg.streaming ? ' streaming' : '';\n752\t\n753\t    // Parse markdown if marked is available (skip for empty streaming)\n754\t    let contentHtml = msg.content || '';\n755\t    if (contentHtml && typeof marked !== 'undefined' && !msg.streaming) {\n756\t      try {\n757\t        contentHtml = marked.parse(msg.content);\n758\t      } catch (e) {\n759\t        console.warn('Markdown parsing failed:', e);\n760\t        contentHtml = msg.content.replace(/\\n/g, '<br>');\n761\t      }\n762\t    } else if (contentHtml) {\n763\t      contentHtml = msg.content.replace(/\\n/g, '<br>');\n764\t    }\n765\t\n766\t    // Show cursor for streaming messages\n767\t    if (msg.streaming) {\n768\t      contentHtml += '<span class=\"streaming-cursor\">▋</span>';\n769\t    }\n770\t\n771\t    return `\n772\t      <div class=\"transcript-message ${roleClass}${streamingClass}\" data-idx=\"${idx}\">\n773\t        <div class=\"transcript-label\">${roleLabel}</div>\n774\t        <div class=\"transcript-text\">${contentHtml}</div>\n775\t      </div>\n776\t    `;\n777\t  }).join('');\n778\t\n779\t  container.innerHTML = html;\n780\t\n781\t  // Auto-scroll to bottom\n782\t  container.scrollTop = container.scrollHeight;\n783\t};\n784\t\n785\t// Handle incoming messages from WebRTC for transcript\n786\tconst handleWebRTCMessage = (event) => {\n787\t  try {\n788\t    // event now has { data: string, message: object } from our modified ducke client\n789\t    const data = event.message || (typeof event.data === 'string' ? JSON.parse(event.data) : event.data);\n790\t\n791\t    // Perf telemetry hooks\n792\t    if (data.type === 'input_audio_buffer.speech_started') {\n793\t      perfReset();\n794\t      perfTimeline.speechStarted = perfTs();\n795\t      console.log(`[DUCK-E Perf] speech_started ts=${perfTimeline.speechStarted.toFixed(0)}ms`);\n796\t    } else if (data.type === 'input_audio_buffer.speech_stopped') {\n797\t      if (perfTimeline) {\n798\t        perfTimeline.speechStopped = perfTs();\n799\t        const delta = perfTimeline.speechStopped - (perfTimeline.speechStarted ?? perfTimeline.speechStopped);\n800\t        console.log(`[DUCK-E Perf] speech_stopped  speech_dur=${delta.toFixed(0)}ms`);\n801\t      }\n802\t    } else if (data.type === 'conversation.item.input_audio_transcription.completed') {\n803\t      if (perfTimeline) {\n804\t        perfTimeline.transcriptionDone = perfTs();\n805\t        const start = perfTimeline.speechStopped ?? perfTimeline.speechStarted;\n806\t        const delta = start != null ? perfTimeline.transcriptionDone - start : null;\n807\t        console.log(`[DUCK-E Perf] transcription_done  transcription_dur=${delta != null ? delta.toFixed(0) : '?'}ms`);\n808\t      }\n809\t    } else if (data.type === 'response.created') {\n810\t      if (!perfTimeline) perfReset();\n811\t      perfTimeline.responseCreated = perfTs();\n812\t      console.log(`[DUCK-E Perf] response.created ts=${perfTimeline.responseCreated.toFixed(0)}ms`);\n813\t    } else if (data.type === 'response.function_call_arguments.done') {\n814\t      if (perfTimeline) {\n815\t        const callId = data.call_id;\n816\t        perfTimeline.toolCalls[callId] = { name: data.name, dispatched: perfTs(), resultReceived: null };\n817\t        console.log(`[DUCK-E Perf] tool_dispatched  tool=${data.name} call_id=${callId}`);\n818\t      }\n819\t    } else if (data.type === 'response.output_item.done') {\n820\t      if (perfTimeline && data.item?.type === 'function_call') {\n821\t        const callId = data.item.call_id;\n822\t        if (perfTimeline.toolCalls[callId]) {\n823\t          perfTimeline.toolCalls[callId].resultReceived = perfTs();\n824\t          const dur = perfTimeline.toolCalls[callId].resultReceived - perfTimeline.toolCalls[callId].dispatched;\n825\t          console.log(`[DUCK-E Perf] tool_result_received  tool=${data.item.name} call_id=${callId} dur=${dur.toFixed(0)}ms`);\n826\t        }\n827\t      }\n828\t    } else if (data.type === 'response.done') {\n829\t      if (perfTimeline) {\n830\t        perfTimeline.responseDone = perfTs();\n831\t        perfLogSummary();\n832\t      }\n833\t    }\n834\t\n835\t    // Log message types for debugging (can be removed later)\n836\t    if (data.type) {\n837\t      console.log('WebRTC message type:', data.type);\n838\t    }\n839\t\n840\t    // Handle different message types from OpenAI Realtime API\n841\t\n842\t    // Conversation item created - create placeholder in correct order\n843\t    // gpt-realtime-2 uses 'conversation.item.added'; older models use 'conversation.item.created'\n844\t    if (data.type === 'conversation.item.created' || data.type === 'conversation.item.added') {\n845\t      const item = data.item;\n846\t      if 'duck-e-ptt'\n};\n\n// Cost tracking state (gpt-realtime-2 + backend APIs)\nlet sessionCost = {\n  startTime: null,\n  totalInputTextTokens: 0,\n  totalInputAudioTokens: 0,\n  totalOutputTextTokens: 0,\n  totalOutputAudioTokens: 0,\n  totalCachedTokens: 0,\n  backendInputTokens: 0,   // gpt-5.4-nano (web_search, memory extraction)\n  backendOutputTokens: 0,\n};\n\n// Pricing constants for gpt-realtime-2 (per token)\nconst PRICING = {\n  textInput:     4.00 / 1_000_000,\n  textOutput:   16.00 / 1_000_000,\n  audioInput:   32.00 / 1_000_000,\n  audioOutput:  64.00 / 1_000_000,\n  cachedInput:   0.40 / 1_000_000,\n  // gpt-5.4-nano (web_search, memory extraction)\n  backendInput:  0.20 / 1_000_000,\n  backendOutput: 1.25 / 1_000_000,\n};\n\nconst refreshCostDisplay = () => {\n  if (!sessionCost.startTime) return;\n\n  const backendCost =\n    (sessionCost.backendInputTokens  * PRICING.backendInput)  +\n    (sessionCost.backendOutputTokens * PRICING.backendOutput);\n\n  const totalCost =\n    (sessionCost.totalInputTextTokens   * PRICING.textInput)   +\n    (sessionCost.totalInputAudioTokens  * PRICING.audioInput)  +\n    (sessionCost.totalOutputTextTokens  * PRICING.textOutput)  +\n    (sessionCost.totalOutputAudioTokens * PRICING.audioOutput) +\n    (sessionCost.totalCachedTokens      * PRICING.cachedInput) +\n    backendCost;\n\n  const elapsedMs = Date.now() - sessionCost.startTime;\n  const elapsedHours = elapsedMs / 3_600_000;\n  const hourlyRate = elapsedHours > 0 ? totalCost / elapsedHours : 0;\n\n  const costs = {\n    audioInput:  sessionCost.totalInputAudioTokens  * PRICING.audioInput,\n    audioOutput: sessionCost.totalOutputAudioTokens * PRICING.audioOutput,\n    textInput:   sessionCost.totalInputTextTokens   * PRICING.textInput,\n    textOutput:  sessionCost.totalOutputTextTokens  * PRICING.textOutput,\n    cached:      sessionCost.totalCachedTokens      * PRICING.cachedInput,\n    backend:     backendCost,\n  };\n\n  updateCostDisplay(totalCost, hourlyRate, costs, elapsedMs);\n};\n\nconst updateCostFromResponse = (usage) => {\n  if (!sessionCost.startTime) sessionCost.startTime = Date.now();\n\n  const details = usage.input_token_details || {};\n  const outDetails = usage.output_token_details || {};\n\n  sessionCost.totalInputTextTokens    += details.text_tokens    || 0;\n  sessionCost.totalInputAudioTokens   += details.audio_tokens   || 0;\n  sessionCost.totalCachedTokens       += details.cached_tokens  || 0;\n  sessionCost.totalOutputTextTokens   += outDetails.text_tokens  || 0;\n  sessionCost.totalOutputAudioTokens  += outDetails.audio_tokens || 0;\n\n  refreshCostDisplay();\n};\n\nlet costPanelListenerAttached = false;\n\n// Reset cost tracking state (call on reconnect)\nconst resetCostState = () => {\n  sessionCost = {\n    startTime: null,\n    totalInputTextTokens: 0,\n    totalInputAudioTokens: 0,\n    totalOutputTextTokens: 0,\n    totalOutputAudioTokens: 0,\n    totalCachedTokens: 0,\n    backendInputTokens: 0,\n    backendOutputTokens: 0,\n  };\n  const panel = document.getElementById('cost-panel');\n  const el = document.getElementById('cost-display');\n  if (panel) panel.style.display = 'none';\n  if (el) el.style.display = 'none';\n};\n\nconst updateCostDisplay = (totalCost, hourlyRate, costs, elapsedMs) => {\n  const el = document.getElementById('cost-display');\n  const panel = document.getElementById('cost-panel');\n  if (!el || !panel) return;\n  el.style.display = 'block';\n  panel.style.display = 'block';\n\n  const fmt = (v) => '$' + v.toFixed(2);\n  const mins = Math.floor(elapsedMs / 60000);\n  const secs = Math.floor((elapsedMs % 60000) / 1000);\n  const duration = `${mins}m ${secs.toString().padStart(2, '0')}s`;\n\n  el.innerHTML = `<button class=\"ducke-btn ducke-btn--xs\">Est. ~${fmt(hourlyRate)}/hr</button>`;\n\n  if (!costPanelListenerAttached) {\n    el.addEventListener('click', () => panel.classList.toggle('open'));\n    costPanelListenerAttached = true;\n  }\n\n  panel.innerHTML = `\n    <div class=\"cost-breakdown\">\n      <div class=\"cost-summary-row\">\n        <div class=\"cost-item\"><span>Duration</span><span>${duration}</span></div>\n        <div class=\"cost-item\"><span>Session Total</span><span>${fmt(totalCost)}</span></div>\n        <div class=\"cost-item\"><span>Model</span><span class=\"cost-val\" style=\"font-family:'Fira Code',monospace;font-size:0.75em\">${typeof APP_MODEL !== 'undefined' ? APP_MODEL : ''}</span></div>\n      </div>\n      <hr class=\"cost-divider\">\n      <div class=\"cost-grid\">\n        <div class=\"cost-item\"><span>Audio In</span><span class=\"cost-val\">${fmt(costs.audioInput)}</span></div>\n        <div class=\"cost-item\"><span>Audio Out</span><span class=\"cost-val\">${fmt(costs.audioOutput)}</span></div>\n        <div class=\"cost-item\"><span>Text In</span><span class=\"cost-val\">${fmt(costs.textInput)}</span></div>\n        <div class=\"cost-item\"><span>Text Out</span><span class=\"cost-val\">${fmt(costs.textOutput)}</span></div>\n        <div class=\"cost-item\"><span>Cached</span><span class=\"cost-val\">${fmt(costs.cached)}</span></div>\n        <div class=\"cost-item\"><span>Backend</span><span class=\"cost-val\">${fmt(costs.backend)}</span></div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  `;\n\n  // Brief flash to indicate update\n  el.classList.remove('cost-flash');\n  void el.offsetWidth; // reflow to restart animation\n  el.classList.add('cost-flash');\n};\n\n// Performance timeline tracking\nlet perfTimeline = null;\n\nconst perfReset = () => {\n  perfTimeline = {\n    speechStarted: null,\n    speechStopped: null,\n    transcriptionDone: null,\n    responseCreated: null,\n    // tool calls: map from call_id -> { dispatched, resultReceived }\n    toolCalls: {},\n    responseDone: null,\n  };\n};\n\nconst perfTs = () => performance.now();\n\nconst perfLogSummary = () => {\n  if (!perfTimeline) return;\n  const p = perfTimeline;\n  const fmt = (ms) => ms != null ? (ms / 1000).toFixed(2) + 's' : '?';\n  const delta = (a, b) => (a != null && b != null) ? b - a : null;\n\n  const speechDur = delta(p.speechStarted, p.speechStopped);\n  const transcriptionDur = delta(p.speechStopped, p.transcriptionDone);\n  const thinkingDur = delta(p.transcriptionDone ?? p.speechStopped, p.responseCreated);\n\n  const toolSummaries = Object.entries(p.toolCalls).map(([id, tc]) => {\n    const dur = delta(tc.dispatched, tc.resultReceived);\n    return `tool_call(${tc.name ?? id}): ${fmt(dur)}`;\n  });\n\n  const responseDur = (() => {\n    const afterTools = Object.values(p.toolCalls).map(tc => tc.resultReceived).filter(Boolean);\n    const start = afterTools.length > 0 ? Math.max(...afterTools) : p.responseCreated;\n    return delta(start, p.responseDone);\n  })();\n\n  const total = delta(p.speechStarted ?? p.responseCreated, p.responseDone);\n\n  const parts = [\n    `speech: ${fmt(speechDur)}`,\n    `transcription: ${fmt(transcriptionDur)}`,\n    `thinking: ${fmt(thinkingDur)}`,\n    ...toolSummaries,\n    `response: ${fmt(responseDur)}`,\n    `total: ${fmt(total)}`,\n  ];\n  console.log(`[DUCK-E Perf] ${parts.join(', ')}`);\n};\n\n// Configure marked for safe rendering\nif (typeof marked !== 'undefined') {\n  marked.setOptions({\n    breaks: true,  // Convert \\n to <br>\n    gfm: true,     // GitHub Flavored Markdown\n    sanitize: false // We trust the content from our backend\n  });\n}\n\n// Load mute state from localStorage\nconst loadMuteState = () => {\n  const saved = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEYS.Muted);\n  return saved === 'true';\n};\n\n// Save mute state to localStorage\nconst saveMuteState = (muted) => {\n  localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEYS.Muted, muted.toString());\n};\n\n// Load push-to-talk state from localStorage\nconst loadPushToTalkState = () => {\n  const saved = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEYS.PTT);\n  return saved === 'true';\n};\n\n// Save push-to-talk state to localStorage\nconst savePushToTalkState = (enabled) => {\n  localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEYS.PTT, enabled.toString());\n};\n\n// OAuth Functions\n\n// Load OAuth state from localStorage\nconst loadOAuthState = () => {\n  try {\n    const token = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEYS.TOKEN);\n    const userInfoStr = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEYS.USER_INFO);\n    if (token && userInfoStr) {\n      oauthToken = token;\n      userInfo = JSON.parse(userInfoStr);\n      return true;\n    }\n  } catch (e) {\n    console.error('Failed to load OAuth state:', e);\n  }\n  return false;\n};\n\n// Save OAuth state to localStorage\nconst saveOAuthState = (token, user) => {\n  localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEYS.TOKEN, token);\n  localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEYS.USER_INFO, JSON.stringify(user));\n  oauthToken = token;\n  userInfo = user;\n};\n\n// Clear OAuth state from localStorage\nconst clearOAuthState = () => {\n  localStorage.removeItem(STORAGE_KEYS.TOKEN);\n  localStorage.removeItem(STORAGE_KEYS.USER_INFO);\n  oauthToken = null;\n  userInfo = null;\n};\n\n// Update login UI based on OAuth state\nconst updateLoginUI = () => {\n  const loginBtn = document.getElementById('login-btn');\n  const userInfoDiv = document.getElementById('user-info');\n  const userAvatar = document.getElementById('user-avatar');\n  const userName = document.getElementById('user-name');\n  const userEmail = document.getElementById('user-email');\n\n  if (userInfo && oauthToken) {\n    // User is logged in\n    if (loginBtn) loginBtn.style.display = 'none';\n    if (userInfoDiv) userInfoDiv.style.display = 'flex';\n\n    // Update user info\n    if (userName) userName.textContent = userInfo.name || 'User';\n    if (userEmail) userEmail.textContent = userInfo.email || '';\n\n    // Set avatar (first letter of name)\n    if (userAvatar) {\n      const firstLetter = (userInfo.name || 'U').charAt(0).toUpperCase();\n      userAvatar.textContent = firstLetter;\n    }\n  } else {\n    // User is not logged in\n    if (loginBtn && typeof OAUTH_CONFIGURED !== 'undefined' && OAUTH_CONFIGURED) {\n      loginBtn.style.display = 'inline-flex';\n    }\n    if (userInfoDiv) userInfoDiv.style.display = 'none';\n  }\n};\n\n// Handle OAuth login\nconst handleLogin = () => {\n  // Redirect to Google OAuth\n  const redirectUri = `${window.location.protocol}//${window.location.host}/auth/callback`;\n  window.location.href = `/auth/login?redirect_uri=${encodeURIComponent(redirectUri)}`;\n};\n\n// Handle OAuth logout\nconst handleLogout = () => {\n  clearOAuthState();\n  updateLoginUI();\n\n  // Disconnect if connected\n  if (connectionStatus && webRTC) {\n    webRTC.close();\n    updateUI(\"disconnected\");\n    connectionStatus = false;\n    resetCostState();\n  }\n};\n\n// Get WebSocket URL with auth headers\nconst getWebSocketUrl = () => {\n  const url = new URL(socketUrl);\n\n  // Add OAuth token if available\n  if (oauthToken) {\n    // We'll pass the token via WebSocket subprotocol or query param\n    // For now, we'll pass it as a query parameter (less secure but functional)\n    // In production, you'd want to pass it via WebSocket subprotocols\n    url.searchParams.set('token', oauthToken);\n  }\n\n  return url.toString();\n};\n\n// Update mute button UI (both main and inline)\nconst updateMuteUI = (muted) => {\n  // Main controls\n  const muteBtn = document.getElementById('mute-btn');\n  const muteIcon = document.getElementById('mute-icon');\n  const muteText = document.getElementById('mute-text');\n  // Inline controls\n  const muteBtnInline = document.getElementById('mute-btn-inline');\n  const muteIconInline = document.getElementById('mute-icon-inline');\n  const muteTextInline = document.getElementById('mute-text-inline');\n\n  const icon = muted ? '🔇' : '🔊';\n  const text = muted ? 'Unmute' : 'Mute';\n\n  if (muteBtn) {\n    if (muted) {\n      muteBtn.classList.add('muted');\n    } else {\n      muteBtn.classList.remove('muted');\n    }\n  }\n  if (muteIcon) muteIcon.textContent = icon;\n  if (muteText) muteText.textContent = text;\n\n  // Update inline controls\n  if (muteBtnInline) {\n    if (muted) {\n      muteBtnInline.classList.add('muted');\n    } else {\n      muteBtnInline.classList.remove('muted');\n    }\n  }\n  if (muteIconInline) muteIconInline.textContent = icon;\n  if (muteTextInline) muteTextInline.textContent = text;\n};\n\n// Update push-to-talk button UI (both main and inline)\nconst updatePTTUI = (enabled) => {\n  console.log('updatePTTUI called with enabled:', enabled);\n  // Main controls\n  const pttToggle = document.getElementById('ptt-toggle');\n  const pttBtn = document.getElementById('ptt-btn');\n  const pttHint = document.querySelector('.ptt-hint');\n  // Inline controls\n  const pttToggleInline = document.getElementById('ptt-toggle-inline');\n  const pttBtnInline = document.getElementById('ptt-btn-inline');\n\n  if (pttToggle) pttToggle.checked = enabled;\n  if (pttToggleInline) pttToggleInline.checked = enabled;\n\n  // Main PTT button\n  if (pttBtn) {\n    if (enabled) {\n      pttBtn.classList.remove('hidden');\n      pttBtn.style.display = 'flex';\n    } else {\n      pttBtn.classList.add('hidden');\n      pttBtn.style.display = 'none';\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Inline PTT button\n  if (pttBtnInline) {\n    if (enabled) {\n      pttBtnInline.classList.remove('hidden');\n      pttBtnInline.style.display = 'flex';\n    } else {\n      pttBtnInline.classList.add('hidden');\n      pttBtnInline.style.display = 'none';\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Show/hide the hint\n  if (pttHint) {\n    pttHint.style.display = enabled ? 'block' : 'none';\n  }\n};\n\n// Set microphone enabled state\nconst setMicrophoneEnabled = (enabled) => {\n  console.log('setMicrophoneEnabled called:', enabled, 'webRTC:', !!webRTC);\n  if (webRTC) {\n    console.log('webRTC.microphone:', webRTC.microphone);\n    if (webRTC.microphone) {\n      webRTC.microphone.enabled = enabled;\n      console.log(`Microphone ${enabled ? 'enabled' : 'disabled'}`);\n    } else {\n      console.warn('webRTC.microphone not available');\n    }\n  }\n};\n\n// Toggle mute state\nconst toggleMute = () => {\n  console.log('toggleMute clicked, webRTC:', !!webRTC, 'connectionStatus:', connectionStatus);\n\n  // Allow toggling state even without connection (will apply on connect)\n  isMuted = !isMuted;\n  updateMuteUI(isMuted);\n  saveMuteState(isMuted);\n  console.log(`Mute state toggled to: ${isMuted}`);\n\n  // Apply immediately if connected\n  if (webRTC && webRTC.microphone) {\n    setMicrophoneEnabled(!isMuted);\n  }\n};\n\n// Toggle push-to-talk mode\nconst togglePushToTalk = () => {\n  console.log('togglePushToTalk clicked, current state:', isPushToTalk);\n\n  isPushToTalk = !isPushToTalk;\n  updatePTTUI(isPushToTalk);\n  savePushToTalkState(isPushToTalk);\n  console.log(`Push-to-talk mode toggled to: ${isPushToTalk}`);\n\n  // Apply immediately if connected\n  if (webRTC && webRTC.microphone) {\n    if (isPushToTalk) {\n      // Entering PTT mode - disable mic by default\n      setMicrophoneEnabled(false);\n    } else {\n      // Leaving PTT mode - restore based on mute state\n      setMicrophoneEnabled(!isMuted);\n    }\n  }\n};\n\n// Push-to-talk button handlers\nconst startTalking = () => {\n  if (!isPushToTalk || !webRTC || !webRTC.microphone) return;\n\n  const pttBtn = document.getElementById('ptt-btn');\n  const pttBtnInline = document.getElementById('ptt-btn-inline');\n  if (pttBtn) pttBtn.classList.add('active');\n  if (pttBtnInline) pttBtnInline.classList.add('active');\n  setMicrophoneEnabled(true);\n  console.log('PTT: Started talking');\n};\n\nconst stopTalking = () => {\n  if (!isPushToTalk || !webRTC || !webRTC.microphone) return;\n\n  const pttBtn = document.getElementById('ptt-btn');\n  const pttBtnInline = document.getElementById('ptt-btn-inline');\n  if (pttBtn) pttBtn.classList.remove('active');\n  if (pttBtnInline) pttBtnInline.classList.remove('active');\n  setMicrophoneEnabled(false);\n  console.log('PTT: Stopped talking');\n};\n\n// Update layout based on chat history (desktop: show inline controls when has content)\nconst updateLayoutMode = (hasHistory) => {\n  const mainContent = document.querySelector('.main-content');\n  if (mainContent) {\n    if (hasHistory) {\n      mainContent.classList.add('has-history');\n    } else {\n      mainContent.classList.remove('has-history');\n    }\n  }\n};\n\n// Transcript display functions\nconst showTranscript = () => {\n  const card = document.getElementById('transcript-card');\n  // Only show and switch layout when there's actual content (not empty placeholders)\n  const hasVisibleContent = transcriptMessages.some(msg => msg.content || msg.streaming);\n  if (card && hasVisibleContent) card.classList.add('visible');\n  updateLayoutMode(hasVisibleContent);\n};\n\nconst hideTranscript = () => {\n  const card = document.getElementById('transcript-card');\n  if (card) card.classList.remove('visible');\n  updateLayoutMode(false);\n};\n\nconst clearTranscript = () => {\n  transcriptMessages = [];\n  renderTranscript();\n  updateLayoutMode(false);\n};\n\n// Find message by itemId\nconst findMessageByItemId = (itemId) => {\n  return transcriptMessages.findIndex(msg => msg.itemId === itemId);\n};\n\n// Create placeholder for conversation item (called when item is created - correct order)\nconst createMessagePlaceholder = (itemId, role) => {\n  // Check if already exists\n  if (findMessageByItemId(itemId) !== -1) return;\n  transcriptMessages.push({\n    itemId,\n    role,\n    content: '',\n    timestamp: Date.now(),\n    pending: true  // Mark as waiting for transcription\n  });\n  renderTranscript();\n  showTranscript();\n};\n\n// Update message content by itemId\nconst updateMessageByItemId = (itemId, content, options = {}) => {\n  const index = findMessageByItemId(itemId);\n  if (index !== -1) {\n    transcriptMessages[index].content = content;\n    transcriptMessages[index].pending = false;\n    if (options.streaming !== undefined) {\n      transcriptMessages[index].streaming = options.streaming;\n    }\n    renderTranscript();\n    showTranscript();\n    return index;\n  }\n  return -1;\n};\n\n// Format tool name for display\nconst formatToolName = (name) => {\n  const displayNames = {\n    get_current_weather: 'Weather',\n    web_search: 'Web Search',\n    web_fetch: 'Fetch URL',\n    voice_change: 'Voice Change',\n    save_memory: 'Save Memory',\n    recall_memories: 'Recall Memories'\n  };\n  return displayNames[name] || name.replace(/_/g, ' ').replace(/\\b\\w/g, l => l.toUpperCase());\n};\n\n// Add a tool call message to the transcript\nconst addToolCallMessage = (name, args, callId) => {\n  transcriptMessages.push({\n    role: 'tool',\n    type: 'tool_call',\n    toolName: name,\n    toolArgs: args,\n    callId: callId,\n    status: 'pending',\n    result: null,\n    timestamp: Date.now(),\n    justAdded: true // Flag for initial animation\n  });\n  renderTranscript();\n  showTranscript();\n};\n\n// Legacy function for messages without itemId\nconst addTranscriptMessage = (role, content, itemId = null) => {\n  if (itemId) {\n    const index = findMessageByItemId(itemId);\n    if (index !== -1) {\n      // Update existing placeholder\n      transcriptMessages[index].content = content;\n      transcriptMessages[index].pending = false;\n      renderTranscript();\n      showTranscript();\n      return;\n    }\n  }\n  // Fallback: add new message\n  transcriptMessages.push({ role, content, timestamp: Date.now(), itemId });\n  renderTranscript();\n  showTranscript();\n};\n\n// Start a new streaming response (returns index)\nconst startStreamingResponse = (role, itemId = null) => {\n  let index;\n  if (itemId) {\n    index = findMessageByItemId(itemId);\n    if (index !== -1) {\n      // Use existing placeholder\n      transcriptMessages[index].streaming = true;\n      transcriptMessages[index].pending = false;\n    } else {\n      // Create new with itemId\n      index = transcriptMessages.length;\n      transcriptMessages.push({ role, content: '', timestamp: Date.now(), streaming: true, itemId });\n    }\n  } else {\n    index = transcriptMessages.length;\n    transcriptMessages.push({ role, content: '', timestamp: Date.now(), streaming: true });\n  }\n  streamingResponse = { index, content: '', role, itemId };\n  renderTranscript();\n  showTranscript();\n  return index;\n};\n\n// Append to streaming response\nconst appendToStreamingResponse = (delta) => {\n  if (!streamingResponse) return;\n  streamingResponse.content += delta;\n  transcriptMessages[streamingResponse.index].content = streamingResponse.content;\n  renderTranscript(true); // Pass true to indicate streaming update\n};\n\n// Finalize streaming response\nconst finalizeStreamingResponse = (finalContent) => {\n  if (!streamingResponse) return;\n  // Use final content if provided, otherwise keep accumulated content\n  if (finalContent) {\n    transcriptMessages[streamingResponse.index].content = finalContent;\n  }\n  transcriptMessages[streamingResponse.index].streaming = false;\n  streamingResponse = null;\n  renderTranscript();\n};\n\nconst renderTranscript = (isStreamingUpdate = false) => {\n  const container = document.getElementById('transcript-content');\n  if (!container) return;\n\n  if (transcriptMessages.length === 0) {\n    container.innerHTML = '<div class=\"transcript-empty\">Conversation transcript will appear here...</div>';\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // For streaming updates, only update the streaming message's text (much faster)\n  if (isStreamingUpdate && streamingResponse) {\n    const streamingEl = container.querySelector(`[data-idx=\"${streamingResponse.index}\"] .transcript-text`);\n    if (streamingEl) {\n      const msg = transcriptMessages[streamingResponse.index];\n      let contentHtml = msg.content || '';\n      // Simple text for streaming - skip markdown parsing for performance\n      contentHtml = contentHtml.replace(/\\n/g, '<br>');\n      contentHtml += '<span class=\"streaming-cursor\">▋</span>';\n      streamingEl.innerHTML = contentHtml;\n      container.scrollTop = container.scrollHeight;\n      return;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Full render for new messages or finalization\n  // Filter out pending placeholders with no content (always include tool_call messages)\n  const visibleMessages = transcriptMessages.filter(msg => msg.content || msg.streaming || msg.type === 'tool_call');\n\n  if (visibleMessages.length === 0) {\n    container.innerHTML = '<div class=\"transcript-empty\">Conversation transcript will appear here...</div>';\n    return;\n  }\n\n  const html = visibleMessages.map((msg, idx) => {\n    // Tool call messages — collapsed by default, expand to see request + response\n    if (msg.type === 'tool_call') {\n      let argsFormatted = msg.toolArgs || '';\n      try {\n        argsFormatted = JSON.stringify(JSON.parse(msg.toolArgs), null, 2);\n      } catch (e) { /* keep raw */ }\n\n      const statusClass = msg.status === 'completed' ? 'completed' : 'pending';\n\n      // Tool-specific icons\n      const toolIcons = {\n        get_current_weather: '🌤️',\n        web_search: '🔍',\n        web_fetch: '📄',\n        voice_change: '🎙️',\n        save_memory: '💾',\n        recall_memories: '🧠'\n      };\n      const toolIcon = toolIcons[msg.toolName] || '🔧';\n\n      // Format timestamp\n      const time = new Date(msg.timestamp).toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' });\n\n      // Response section inside the expandable body\n      let resultHtml = '';\n      if (msg.result) {\n        resultHtml = `\n          <div class=\"tool-call-section\">\n            <div class=\"tool-call-section-label\">Response</div>\n            <pre class=\"tool-call-section-text\">${msg.result}</pre>\n          </div>`;\n      } else if (msg.status === 'pending') {\n        resultHtml = `\n          <div class=\"tool-call-section\">\n            <span class=\"tool-call-loading\">Waiting for result...</span>\n          </div>`;\n      }\n\n      const justAdded = msg.justAdded ? 'data-just-added=\"true\"' : '';\n      const justCompleted = msg.justCompleted ? 'data-just-completed=\"true\"' : '';\n\n      return `\n        <div class=\"transcript-message tool-call\" data-idx=\"${idx}\" ${justAdded} ${justCompleted}>\n          <details class=\"tool-call-details\" ${msg.justAdded ? 'open' : ''}>\n            <summary class=\"tool-call-summary\">\n              <span class=\"tool-call-icon ${msg.toolName}\">${toolIcon}</span>\n              <span class=\"tool-call-name\">${formatToolName(msg.toolName)}</span>\n              <span class=\"tool-call-timestamp\">${time}</span>\n              <span class=\"tool-call-status ${statusClass}\">${msg.status}</span>\n            </summary>\n            <div class=\"tool-call-body\">\n              <div class=\"tool-call-section\">\n                <div class=\"tool-call-section-label\">Request</div>\n                <pre class=\"tool-call-section-text\">${argsFormatted}</pre>\n              </div>\n              ${resultHtml}\n            </div>\n          </details>\n        </div>\n      `;\n    }\n\n    const roleClass = msg.role === 'user' ? 'user' : msg.role === 'system' ? 'system' : 'assistant';\n    const roleLabel = msg.role === 'user' ? 'You' : msg.role === 'system' ? 'System' : 'DUCK-E';\n    const streamingClass = msg.streaming ? ' streaming' : '';\n\n    // Parse markdown if marked is available (skip for empty streaming)\n    let contentHtml = msg.content || '';\n    if (contentHtml && typeof marked !== 'undefined' && !msg.streaming) {\n      try {\n        contentHtml = marked.parse(msg.content);\n      } catch (e) {\n        console.warn('Markdown parsing failed:', e);\n        contentHtml = msg.content.replace(/\\n/g, '<br>');\n      }\n    } else if (contentHtml) {\n      contentHtml = msg.content.replace(/\\n/g, '<br>');\n    }\n\n    // Show cursor for streaming messages\n    if (msg.streaming) {\n      contentHtml += '<span class=\"streaming-cursor\">▋</span>';\n    }\n\n    return `\n      <div class=\"transcript-message ${roleClass}${streamingClass}\" data-idx=\"${idx}\">\n        <div class=\"transcript-label\">${roleLabel}</div>\n        <div class=\"transcript-text\">${contentHtml}</div>\n      </div>\n    `;\n  }).join('');\n\n  container.innerHTML = html;\n\n  // Auto-scroll to bottom\n  container.scrollTop = container.scrollHeight;\n};\n\n// Handle incoming messages from WebRTC for transcript\nconst handleWebRTCMessage = (event) => {\n  try {\n    // event now has { data: string, message: object } from our modified ducke client\n    const data = event.message || (typeof event.data === 'string' ? JSON.parse(event.data) : event.data);\n\n    // Perf telemetry hooks\n    if (data.type === 'input_audio_buffer.speech_started') {\n      perfReset();\n      perfTimeline.speechStarted = perfTs();\n      console.log(`[DUCK-E Perf] speech_started ts=${perfTimeline.speechStarted.toFixed(0)}ms`);\n    } else if (data.type === 'input_audio_buffer.speech_stopped') {\n      if (perfTimeline) {\n        perfTimeline.speechStopped = perfTs();\n        const delta = perfTimeline.speechStopped - (perfTimeline.speechStarted ?? perfTimeline.speechStopped);\n        console.log(`[DUCK-E Perf] speech_stopped  speech_dur=${delta.toFixed(0)}ms`);\n      }\n    } else if (data.type === 'conversation.item.input_audio_transcription.completed') {\n      if (perfTimeline) {\n        perfTimeline.transcriptionDone = perfTs();\n        const start = perfTimeline.speechStopped ?? perfTimeline.speechStarted;\n        const delta = start != null ? perfTimeline.transcriptionDone - start : null;\n        console.log(`[DUCK-E Perf] transcription_done  transcription_dur=${delta != null ? delta.toFixed(0) : '?'}ms`);\n      }\n    } else if (data.type === 'response.created') {\n      if (!perfTimeline) perfReset();\n      perfTimeline.responseCreated = perfTs();\n      console.log(`[DUCK-E Perf] response.created ts=${perfTimeline.responseCreated.toFixed(0)}ms`);\n    } else if (data.type === 'response.function_call_arguments.done') {\n      if (perfTimeline) {\n        const callId = data.call_id;\n        perfTimeline.toolCalls[callId] = { name: data.name, dispatched: perfTs(), resultReceived: null };\n        console.log(`[DUCK-E Perf] tool_dispatched  tool=${data.name} call_id=${callId}`);\n      }\n    } else if (data.type === 'response.output_item.done') {\n      if (perfTimeline && data.item?.type === 'function_call') {\n        const callId = data.item.call_id;\n        if (perfTimeline.toolCalls[callId]) {\n          perfTimeline.toolCalls[callId].resultReceived = perfTs();\n          const dur = perfTimeline.toolCalls[callId].resultReceived - perfTimeline.toolCalls[callId].dispatched;\n          console.log(`[DUCK-E Perf] tool_result_received  tool=${data.item.name} call_id=${callId} dur=${dur.toFixed(0)}ms`);\n        }\n      }\n    } else if (data.type === 'response.done') {\n      if (perfTimeline) {\n        perfTimeline.responseDone = perfTs();\n        perfLogSummary();\n      }\n    }\n\n    // Log message types for debugging (can be removed later)\n    if (data.type) {\n      console.log('WebRTC message type:', data.type);\n    }\n\n    // Handle different message types from OpenAI Realtime API\n\n    // Conversation item created - create placeholder in correct order\n    // gpt-realtime-2 uses 'conversation.item.added'; older models use 'conversation.item.created'\n    if (data.type === 'conversation.item.created' || data.type === 'conversation.item.added') {\n      const item = data.item;\n      if (item && item.id && item.role) {\n        console.log('Conversation item created:', item.id, item.role);\n        createMessagePlaceholder(item.id, item.role);\n      }\n    }\n    // User's speech transcription completed - update placeholder by item_id\n    else if (data.type === 'conversation.item.input_audio_transcription.completed') {\n      if (data.transcript) {\n        const itemId = data.item_id;\n        console.log('User transcript:', data.transcript, 'itemId:', itemId);\n        currentTurnUserTranscript = data.transcript; // Capture for memory extraction\n        currentTurnAssistantTranscript = ''; // Reset assistant side for new turn\n        if (itemId && findMessageByItemId(itemId) !== -1) {\n          updateMessageByItemId(itemId, data.transcript);\n        } else {\n          // Fallback if no placeholder exists\n          addTranscriptMessage('user', data.transcript, itemId);\n        }\n      }\n    }\n    // Assistant's audio response transcript DELTA (streaming)\n    // gpt-realtime-2 uses 'response.output_audio_transcript.delta'; older models use 'response.audio_transcript.delta'\n    else if (data.type === 'response.audio_transcript.delta' || data.type === 'response.output_audio_transcript.delta') {\n      if (data.delta) {\n        const itemId = data.item_id;\n        // Start streaming if not already or if different item\n        if (!streamingResponse || streamingResponse.type !== 'audio_transcript' || streamingResponse.itemId !== itemId) {\n          startStreamingResponse('assistant', itemId);\n          if (streamingResponse) streamingResponse.type = 'audio_transcript';\n        }\n        appendToStreamingResponse(data.delta);\n      }\n    }\n    // Assistant's audio response transcript completed\n    // gpt-realtime-2 uses 'response.output_audio_transcript.done'; older models use 'response.audio_transcript.done'\n    else if (data.type === 'response.audio_transcript.done' || data.type === 'response.output_audio_transcript.done') {\n      const itemId = data.item_id;\n      if (data.transcript) {\n        currentTurnAssistantTranscript = data.transcript; // Capture for memory extraction\n      }\n      if (streamingResponse && streamingResponse.type === 'audio_transcript') {\n        // Finalize with the complete transcript\n        finalizeStreamingResponse(data.transcript);\n      } else if (data.transcript) {\n        // No streaming was happening, add as complete message\n        console.log('Assistant transcript:', data.transcript);\n        addTranscriptMessage('assistant', data.transcript, itemId);\n      }\n    }\n    // Assistant's text response DELTA (streaming)\n    else if (data.type === 'response.text.delta') {\n      if (data.delta) {\n        const itemId = data.item_id;\n        // Start streaming if not already or if different item\n        if (!streamingResponse || streamingResponse.type !== 'text' || streamingResponse.itemId !== itemId) {\n          startStreamingResponse('assistant', itemId);\n          if (streamingResponse) streamingResponse.type = 'text';\n else if (data.text) {\n        // No streaming was happening, add as complete message\n        console.log('Assistant text:', data.text);\n        addTranscriptMessage('assistant', data.text,   if (transcriptMessages[idx]) {\n            transcriptMessages[idx].justCompleted = false;\n          }\n        }, 500);\n      }\n    }\n    // Output item done - mark matching tool call as completed\n    else if (data.type === 'response.output_item.done') {\n      const item = data.item;\n      if (item && item.type === 'function_call') {\n        const idx = interrupted - finalize any streaming\n    else if (data.type === 'response.cancelled' || data.type === 'response.done') {\n      if (streamingResponse) {\n        finalizeStreamingResponse();\n      }\n      if (data.type === 'response.done') {\n        // Accumulate token costs from response.done usage data\n        if (data.response?.usage) {\n          updateCostFromResponse(data.response.usage);\n        }\n        // Fire memory extraction if assistant spoke (skips tool-only turns)\n        if (currentTurnUserTranscript && // Backend API cost (web_search, memory extraction via gpt-5.4-nano)\n    else if (data.type === 'ducke.backend_cost') {\n      if (!sessionCost.startTime) sessionCost.startTime = Date.now();\n      sessionCost.backendInputTokens  += data.input_tokens  || 0;\n      sessionCost.backendOutputTokens += data.output_tokens || 0;\n      refreshCostDisplay();\n    }\n  } catch (e) {\n    console.error('Error handling WebRTC message:', e);\n  }\n};\n\n// Function to update the UI elements based on connection status.\nconst updateUI = (status) => {\n  // Main controls\n  const false, error: null };\n\n        // Error boundary: catches React render errors so agentation crashes don't affect the rest of the UI\n        class AgentationErrorBoundary extends React.Component {\n            constructor(props) {\n                super(props);\n                this.state = { hasError: false };\n            }\n            static getDerivedStateFromError() {\n                return { hasError: true };\n            }\n            componentDidCatch(error, info) {\n                console.error('[Agentation] Component error caught by boundary:', error, info);\n breaking the page\n                    return null;\n                }\n                return this.props.children;\n            }\n        }\n\n        try {\n            const { Agentation } = await import('https://esm.sh/agentation@2.3.2?external=react,react-dom');\n            const agentationRoot = document.getElementById('agentation-root');\n            const root = createRoot(agentationRoot);\n            root.render(\n                React.createElement(AgentationErrorBoundary, null,\n                    React.createElement(Agentation, {\n '\": ' + (annotation.comment || '')\n                                );\n                            }\n                        },\n                        onSubmit: function (output, annotations) {\n );\n            // Notify main.js so it can display a voice-change status message\n            if (this.onMessage) {\n              const notif = { type: \"ducke.voice_changed\", voice: message.voice };\n              this.onMessage({ data: JSON.stringify(notif), message: notif });\n            }\n            return;\n          }\n          // Forward function_call_output to onMessage so the transcript can\n          // display the tool result before it is relayed to OpenAI.\n          if (\n            type === \"conversation.item.create\" &&\n            message.item?.type === \"function_call_output\" &&\n            this.onMessage\n          ) {\n            try {\n              this.onMessage({ data: event.data, message: message });\n            } catch (callbackError) {\n              console.error(\"Error in onMessage callback for function_call_output\", callbackError);\n            }\n          }\n          const messageJSON = JSON.stringify(message);\n continuation.\n            // This is done here (not in the backend) so the response.create\n            // is sent directly on the data channel without an extra relay hop.\n            if (\n              type === \"conversation.item.create\" &&\n              message.item?.type === \"function_call_output\"\n            ) {\n              const responseCreate = JSON.stringify({\n                type: \"response.create\",\n              });\n              dc.send(responseCreate);\n              console.log(\"Sent response.create after function_call_output for call_id:\", message.item.call_id);\n            }\n          } else {\n            console.log(\"DC not ready yet, queueing\", message);\n            quedMessages.push(messageJSON);\n            // Queue response.create right after the function_call_output\n            if (\n              type === \"conversation.item.create\" &&\n              message.item?.type === \"function_call_output\"\n            ) {\n              quedMessages.push(JSON.stringify({\n                type: \"response.create\",\n                response: { modalities: [\"text\", \"audio\"] },\n              }));\n            }\n          }\n        } catch (error) {\n          console.error(\"Error processing websocket message\", event.data, error);\n        }\n      };\n      await completed;\n      console.log(\"WebRTC fully operational\");\n    }\n  };\n  return __toCommonJS(index_exports);\n})();\n","numLines":509,"startLine":1,"totalLines":509}}}

Responsibilities:\n    - Obtain an ephemeral key from OpenAI /v1/realtime/sessions (server-side)\n    - Send ducke.init to the browser client to bootstrap WebRTC\n    - Relay tool calls from client -> execute -> return results\n    - Support voice change via ducke.reinit (new ephemeral key, new WebRTC peer)\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(\n        self,\n        websocket: WebSocket,\n        model: str,\n        api_key: str,\n        system_message: str,\n        voice: str = \"alloy\",\n        logger: Optional[Logger] = None,\n        on_turn_done: Optional[Callable] = None,\n    ):\n        self.websocket = websocket\n        self.model = model\n        self.api_key = api_key\n        self.system_message = system_message\n        self.voice = voice\n        self.logger = logger or getLogger(__name__)\n        self.tools: list[dict[str, Any]] = []\n        self.tool_handlers: dict[str, Callable] = {}\n        self.on_turn_done = on_turn_done  # async (user_text, assistant_text) -> None\n\n    def register_tool(\n        self,\n        name: str,\n        description: str,\n        handler: Callable,\n        parameters: dict[str, Any],\n    ) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Register a callable tool handler for a given tool name.\"\"\"\n        self.tool_handlers[name] = handler\n        self.tools.append({\n            \"type\": \"function\",\n            \"name\": name,\n            \"description\": description,\n            \"parameters\": parameters,\n        })\n\n    async def _get_ephemeral_key(self, voice: Optional[str] = None) -> dict[str, Any]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Call OpenAI /v1/realtime/client_secrets to obtain a short-lived ephemeral\n        key for the gpt-realtime-2 WebRTC flow. Responsibilities:\n    - Obtain an ephemeral key from OpenAI /v1/realtime/sessions (server-side)\n    - Send ducke.init to the browser client to bootstrap WebRTC\n    - Relay tool calls from client -> execute -> return results\n    - Support voice change via ducke.reinit (new ephemeral key, new WebRTC peer)\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(\n        self,\n        websocket: WebSocket,\n        model: str,\n        api_key: str,\n        system_message: str,\n        voice: str = \"alloy\",\n        logger: Optional[Logger] = None,\n        on_turn_done: Optional[Callable] = None,\n    ):\n        self.websocket = websocket\n        self.model = model\n        self.api_key = api_key\n        self.system_message = system_message\n        self.voice = voice\n        self.logger = logger or getLogger(__name__)\n        self.tools: list[dict[str, Any]] = []\n        self.tool_handlers: dict[str, Callable] = {}\n        self.on_turn_done = on_turn_done  # async (user_text, assistant_text) -> None\n\n    def register_tool(\n        self,\n        name: str,\n        description: str,\n        handler: Callable,\n        parameters: dict[str, Any],\n    ) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Register a callable tool handler for a given tool name.\"\"\"\n        self.tool_handlers[name] = handler\n        self.tools.append({\n            \"type\": \"function\",\n            \"name\": name,\n            \"description\": description,\n            \"parameters\": parameters,\n        })\n\n    async def _get_ephemeral_key(self, voice: Optional[str] = None) -> dict[str, Any]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Call OpenAI /v1/realtime/client_secrets to obtain a short-lived ephemeral\n        key for the gpt-realtime-2 WebRTC flow.  Returns a SANITIZED config safe\n        to send to the browser — only the ephemeral value and model are included;\n        the real API key is never forwarded.\n        \"\"\"\n        async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=30.0) as client:\n            resp = await client.post(\n                \"https://api.openai.com/v1/realtime/client_secrets\",\n                headers={\n                    \"Authorization\": f\"Bearer {self.api_key}\",\n                    \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\",\n                },\n                json={\n                    \"session\": {\n                        \"type\": \"realtime\",\n                        \"model\": self.model,\n                        \"audio\": {\n                            \"output\": {\"voice\": voice or self.voice},\n                            \"input\": {\n                                \"transcription\": {\"model\": \"whisper-1\"},\n                            },\n                        },\n                        \"instructions\": self.system_message,\n                        \"tools\": self.tools,\n                    }\n                },\n            )\n            if not resp.is_success:\n                self.logger.error(\n                    f\"OpenAI client_secrets failed: {resp.status_code} — {resp.text}\"\n                )\n            resp.raise_for_status()\n            data = resp.json()\n\n        # SECURITY: Only return fields the client needs.\n        # Never forward the raw response — it may contain server-side secrets.\n        return {\n            \"client_secret\": {\"value\": data[\"value\"]},\n            \"model\": self.model,\n        }\n\n    async def change_voice(self, voice: str) -> str:\n        \"\"\"\n        Change the assistant's voice by sending a session.update event.\n\n        Uses the OpenAI Realtime API's session.update event to change the voice\n        without needing to regenerate ephemeral keys or tear down the WebRTC\n        connection. This is faster and more reliable than the old reinit approach.\n\n        The function_call_output reply (sent by _handle_tool_call after this\n        returns) will be spoken by DUCK-E in the new voice.\n        \"\"\"\n        if voice not in AVAILABLE_VOICES:\n            return (\n                f\"Invalid voice '{voice}'. \"\n                f\"Available voices: {', '.join(AVAILABLE_VOICES)}\"\n            )\n\n        try:\n            self.logger.info(f\"Changing voice to: {voice}\")\n            self.voice = voice\n\n            # Send a session.update event to change the voice.\n            # The function_call_output from _handle_tool_call (containing\n            # \"Voice changed to X\") will be spoken in the new voice, and\n            # ag2client.js will send response.create to trigger continuation.\n            await self.websocket.send_json({\n                \"type\": \"ducke.session_update\",\n                \"update\": {\n },\n            })\n            return f\"Voice changed to {voice}.\"\n        except Exception as e:\n            self.logger.error(f\"Failed to change voice: {e}\", exc_info=True)\n            return f\"Failed to change voice: {str(e)}\"\n\n    async def run(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"\n        Main session loop.\n\n        The WebSocket has already been accepted by the security middleware\n        before this is called, so we do NOT call websocket.accept() here.\n        \"\"\"\n        try:\n            session_data = await self._get_ephemeral_key()\n        except Exception as e:\n            self.logger.error(f\"Failed to get ephemeral key: {e}\", exc_info=True)\n            await self.websocket.send_json({\n                \"type\": \"error\",\n                \"error\": f\"Failed to initialize session: {str(e)}\",\n            })\n            await self.websocket.close(code=1011, reason=\"Session initialization failed\")\n            return\n\n        # Send ducke.init\n        # SECURITY: session_data contains only ephemeral key + model.\n        await self.websocket.send_json({\n            \"type\": \"ducke.init\",\n            \"config\": session_data,\n            \"init\": [],\n        })\n\n        try:\n            while True:\n                data = await self.websocket.receive_json()\n                msg_type = data.get(\"type\", \"\")\n                if msg_type == \"response.function_call_arguments.done\":\n                    await self._handle_tool_call(data)\n                elif msg_type == \"ducke.annotation\":\n                    annotation = data.get(\"annotation\", {})\n                    self.logger.info(f\"Annotation received from client: {annotation}\")\n                elif msg_type == \"ducke.turn_done\":\n                    if self.on_turn_done:\n                        user_text = data.get(\"user_text\", \"\")\n                        assistant_text = data.get(\"assistant_text\", \"\")\n                        asyncio.create_task(\n                            self.on_turn_done(user_text, assistant_text)\n                        )\n        except WebSocketDisconnect:\n            pass\n        except Exception as e:\n            self.logger.error(f\"Session error: {e}\", exc_info=True)\n\n    async def send_backend_cost(self, model: str, input_tokens: int, output_tokens: int) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Relay backend API cost data to the browser client.\"\"\"\n        try:\n            await self.websocket.send_json({\n                \"type\": \"ducke.backend_cost\",\n                \"model\": model,\n                \"input_tokens\": input_tokens,\n                \"output_tokens\": output_tokens,\n            })\n        except Exception:\n            pass  # Never crash the session over cost relay\n\n    async def _handle_tool_call(self, data: dict[str, Any]) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Execute a registered tool and send the result back to the client.\"\"\"\n        name = data.get(\"name\")\n        call_id = data.get(\"call_id\")\n        t_received = time.monotonic()\n\n        self.logger.info(json.dumps({\n            \"event\": \"tool_call.received\",\n            \"tool\": name,\n            \"call_id\": call_id,\n            \"ts\": time.time(),\n        }))\n\n        try:\n            args = json.loads(data.get(\"arguments\", \"{}\"))\n        except json.JSONDecodeError:\n            args = {}\n\n        handler = self.tool_handlers.get(name)\n        if not handler:\n            self.logger.warning(f\"No handler registered for tool: {name}\")\n            return\n\n        self.logger.info(json.dumps({\n            \"event\": \"tool_call.handler_start\",\n            \"tool\": name,\n            \"call_id\": call_id,\n            \"args\": args,\n            \"ts\": time.time(),\n        }))\n        t_handler_start = time.monotonic()\n\n        try:\n            if asyncio.iscoroutinefunction(handler):\n                result = await handler(**args)\n            else:\n                result = handler(**args)\n        except Exception as e:\n            self.logger.error(f\"Tool handler error for '{name}': {e}\", exc_info=True)\n            result = f\"Error executing tool: {str(e)}\"\n\n        t_handler_end = time.monotonic()\n        result_str = str(result)\n        self.logger.info(json.dumps({\n            \"event\": \"tool_call.handler_done\",\n            \"tool\": name,\n            \"call_id\": call_id,\n            \"result_size\": len(result_str),\n            \"handler_duration_ms\": round((t_handler_end - t_handler_start) * 1000, 1),\n            \"ts\": time.time(),\n        }))\n\n        await self.websocket.send_json({\n            \"type\": \"conversation.item.create\",\n            \"item\": {\n                \"type\": \"function_call_output\",\n                \"call_id\": call_id,\n                \"output\": result_str,\n            },\n        })\n        # NOTE: response.create is sent by the browser client (ducke.js)\n        # immediately after it forwards the function_call_output to the\n        # OpenAI data channel.  Sending it from the backend was unreliable\n        # because the relay adds latency and the message could be dropped.\n\n        t_sent = time.monotonic()\n        self.logger.info(json.dumps({\n            \"event\": \"tool_call.result_sent\",\n            \"tool\": name,\n            \"call_id\": call_id,\n            \"result_size\": len(result_str),\n            \"total_duration_ms\": round((t_sent - t_received) * 1000, 1),\n            \"ts\": time.time(),\n        }))\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":135,"oldLines":7,"newStart":135,"newLines":7,"lines":["             # Send a session.update event to change the voice.","             # The function_call_output from _handle_tool_call (containing","             # \"Voice changed to X\") will be spoken in the new voice, and","-            # ag2client.js will send response.create to trigger continuation.","+            # ducke.js will send response.create to trigger continuation.","             await self.websocket.send_json({","                 \"type\": \"ducke.session_update\",","                 \"update\": {"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}
